caption: The video depicts an older man with white hair and glasses, dressed in a blue shirt adorned with bird patterns and a necklace, standing at a podium labeled "Kellogg-Hubbard Library." He is addressing an audience seated in front of him, holding a book or notebook as he speaks into a microphone. The setting appears to be indoors, with wooden blinds covering the windows behind him. The atmosphere suggests a formal event, possibly a lecture or reading session, where the speaker is sharing insights or stories with the attentive audience. The logo "ORCA" is visible in the bottom right corner of the screen, indicating the source or affiliation of the video.
